title: hieracium murorum subsp. persimile
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. persimile, also known as hawkweed or Hieracium murorum subsp. persimile, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow or orange flowers and leaves that resemble dandelion leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. persimile is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
